seed_problem: Maximum-weight independent set: select a max-weight set of mutually non-conflicting items on a general conflict graph.
mutation: input: skin the max-weight-independent-set selection as a carnival ride circuit and place the conflict relation on a LARGE general (non-bipartite, dense) graph -- power-substation cliques, a random crowd-flow backbone cycle, random cross conflicts, and a few high-weight high-degree headliner super-connectors -- so the easy bipartite/interval special cases vanish and constructing the optimum simultaneously-lit circuit is NP-hard at n up to 5000.
title: Neon Midway: Simultaneous Ride Circuit
strategies: randomized weighted-greedy restarts keeping the best circuit
local-search add/swap improvement over a greedy seed
